🧠 The OT Advantage
Your coach is an Exercise Science student and future Occupational Therapist. Every prehab cue in this section is grounded in OT principles — joint mechanics, movement longevity, and occupation-specific load patterns. This is clinical-level precision that most personal trainers cannot offer.
Daily Protocol
Athlete Portal • Phase 1

Athlete Portal: Prepare for Game Day

A dedicated command deck for youth and collegiate athletes. Dial in your sport, position, and season phase — we’ll do the rest.

1 = Easy Warmup  ·  10 = Absolute Maximum Effort
1 · Easy5 · Moderate10 · Max
Micro-Recovery Bouts (optional)

Log high-intensity sprints/efforts with their start time and duration. The engine audits the rest interval between consecutive ATP-PC bouts against the 3-minute minimum.

      Sovereign Mastery Protocol
      Bilingual Empire
      Two language engines on Claude Opus 4.7: roleplay a real scenario for live fluency feedback, then deploy gym-floor coaching cues in your target tongue. Both honor your Sovereign Linguistics setting below.
      🎭 Immersion Simulator
      Roleplay a real scenario in your target language. The native speaker replies in character; you get a grammar correction and fluency score per turn.
      📢 Coaching Scripts
      Convert an English coaching cue into a ready-to-shout phrase in your target language. Phonetic guide + literal meaning included so you can verify and pronounce.

          Sovereign Panopticon
          Live Roster Telemetry · Auto-sorted by Risk Severity

          Command-center view of the entire athlete roster. The Intelligence Engine processes each athlete's last 28 days of training load + today's bouts and surfaces the highest-risk states first.

          Loading roster…
          ◇ Sovereign Concierge
          Autonomous Lead Worker · Daily 09:00 UTC · Brevo Templated Outreach

          Scores every pending lead by intake completeness (HOT ≥ 75 / WARM 45-74 / COLD < 45), sends a tier-matched re-engagement email via Brevo, and logs every action below. 14-day cooldown per lead. Hard cap 50 sends per run. Skips provisioned + do-not-contact leads automatically.

          Click refresh to load Concierge log…
          ◇ Incoming Leads
          Pathfinder Intake Queue · Newest First

          Every Pathfinder form submission lands here in real time. PROVISIONED = the client paid + we created their app account. PENDING = lead is in but hasn't completed Stripe checkout yet (re-engagement candidate).

          Click refresh to load roster…

          🔐 Provision Client Profile
          Admin override — use when a paid client cannot reach the app through the normal flow. The new profile is stamped provisioning: admin_override in the audit trail.
          ◇ SOVEREIGN NUTRITION INTAKE
          ◇ Sovereign Nutrition Profile
          Editing —'s dietary profile. Changes save to the client profile AND sync to the cloud so they appear on the client's device.
          ◇ Cloud status · checking…
          ✨ AI Profile Diagnostic
          Five quick questions. Answer in plain English — the AI synthesizes the dietary profile, allergens, likes, and dislikes into a structured intake. You review + edit before saving.
